title: Short Fiction Bibliography
text: SHORT FICTION BIBLIOGRAPHY Tower of Babylon, Omni , November 1990 Division by Zero, Full Spectrum III , June 1991 Understand, Isaac Asimov’s Science Fiction Magazine , August 1991 Story of Your Life, Starlight 2 , November 1998 Catching Crumbs from the Table, Nature , June 1, 2000 Seventy-two Letters, Vanishing Acts , June 2000 Hell is the Absence of God, Starlight 3 , July 2001 Liking What You See: A Documentary, Stories of Your Life and Others , July 2002 What’s Expected of Us, Nature , July 7, 2005 The Merchant and the Alchemist’s Gate, The Merchant and the Alchemist’s Gate , July 2007 Exhalation, Eclipse Two: New Science Fiction and Fantasy , October 2008 The Lifecycle of Software Objects, The Lifecycle of Software Objects , August 2010 Dacey’s Patent Automatic Nanny, The Thackery T. Lambshead Cabinet of Curiosities , July 2011 The Truth of Fact, the Truth of Feeling, Subterranean (online) , Fall, September 2013 The Great Silence, e-flux journal , May 8, 2015 Omphalos, Exhalation , May 2019 Anxiety is the Dizziness of Freedom, Exhalation , May 2019 It’s 2059, and the Rich Kids Are Still Winning, The New York Times , May 27, 2019
